title: mido.yml
description: Configuration for mido — a cross-ecosystem monorepo workspace tool

workspace.description: Name of the workspace (used in CLI output and lock file)

ecosystems.description: Language ecosystems and their packages. Keys are ecosystem names (e.g. typescript, dart)

manifest.description: Manifest filename for this ecosystem (e.g. package.json, pubspec.yaml)

lockfile.description: Lockfile filename for this ecosystem (e.g. bun.lock, pubspec.lock). Optional — used for change detection

packages.description: Paths to packages in this ecosystem, relative to the workspace root

bridges.description: Cross-ecosystem dependencies linked by a shared artifact file

source.description: Package path that produces the artifact

target.description: Package path that consumes the artifact

artifact.description: Path to the shared file relative to the workspace root (e.g. packages/api/openapi.json)

env.description: Environment variable parity checks across packages

shared.description: Environment variable names that must be present in all listed env files

files.description: Paths to .env files to check for parity, relative to the workspace root

commits.description: Conventional commit rules enforced by the commit-msg hook

types.description: Allowed commit types (e.g. feat, fix, docs, refactor)

scopes.description: Allowed commit scopes. If omitted, any scope is accepted

header_max_length.description: Maximum length of the commit header line

body_max_line_length.description: Maximum length of each line in the commit body
